rfq.raw_notes:
From: Mohammed Al-Farsi <m.alfarsi@desert-infra.ae>
Subject: Urgent RFQ - Street and Warehouse Lighting Project

Dear Sales Team,

We are Desert Infrastructure LLC based in Abu Dhabi, UAE.
We require urgent pricing for a major government project.

Contact: Mohammed Al-Farsi, Procurement Director
Phone: +971 2 555 8890
Email: m.alfarsi@desert-infra.ae

We need the following:
250 units LED Street Light 100W for highway project
1500 units LED High Bay 150W for warehouse complex
800 units LED Panel

reply_draft.subject_en: RE: Your RFQ – Reference MOCK-DEAL-FCDD81D2 | AL ROUF LED
reply_draft.subject_ar: RE: طلب عرض الأسعار – مرجع MOCK-DEAL-FCDD81D2 | الروف LED
reply_draft.english:
Dear Mohammed Al-Farsi <m.alfarsi@desert-infra.ae>,

Thank you for reaching out to AL ROUF LED Lighting Technology Co. Ltd.

We have successfully received your Request for Quotation regarding 'Urgent RFQ - Street and Warehouse Lighting Project' and have created a record in our system (Reference: MOCK-DEAL-FCDD81D2).

Our sales team will review your requirements and prepare a detailed quotation within 1–2 business days.

Summary of your enquiry:
  • LED Street Light W for highway project × 250
  • LED High Bay W for warehouse complex × 1500
  • LED Panel W for office blocks × 800
  • LED Tube W for corridors and parking × 2000
  • Required delivery: Before th April × 30
  • Payment: LC at sight preferred, or % TT advance acceptable × 30

Should you have any questions in the meantime, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
AL ROUF LED Lighting Technology Co. Ltd.
Sales & Quotation Team
reply_draft.arabic:

شكراً لتواصلكم مع شركة الروف لتكنولوجيا إضاءة LED.

لقد استلمنا بنجاح طلب عرض الأسعار الخاص بكم بخصوص 'Urgent RFQ - Street and Warehouse Lighting Project' وقمنا بتسجيله في نظامنا (المرجع: MOCK-DEAL-FCDD81D2).

سيقوم فريق المبيعات لدينا بمراجعة متطلباتكم وإعداد عرض أسعار تفصيلي خلال 1-2 يوم عمل.

ملخص استفساركم:
  • LED Street Light W for highway project × 250
  • LED High Bay W for warehouse complex × 1500
  • LED Panel W for office blocks × 800
  • LED Tube W for corridors and parking × 2000
  • Required delivery: Before th April × 30
  • Payment: LC at sight preferred, or % TT advance acceptable × 30

إذا كان لديكم أي استفسارات في الوقت الحالي، فلا تترددوا في التواصل معنا.
